enrichment.summary: Kyle briefly vlogs from his Boulder home on May 28, 2014, describing a productive day working on his porch until 11pm on what appears to be a website project, mentioning his nearby work commute and morning oatmeal routine.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: finds it exciting and rewarding to make progress on projects

transcript.text: Living in Boulder for the year yesterday would have been the 28th
I was I had in works. I was out there on my porch all day long yesterday
Getting caught up or not getting caught up working until like 11
From like nine I think I actually had started around 10 to 11
Yeah, I did pretty well. I think I can finish that page today
After work I go to work really close to where I am now so I'm not going to ride by my normal bicycle shoes just my normal sneakers
We'll drop me off really close to my house
No, my oatmeal is cooking right now
That's about what I did yesterday it was exciting
It's always exciting to get to the next level. I'll explain all this stuff later
My new all this website stuff on dirt
I probably have it all uploaded a couple of months
